farm.polygon_guide_step5: Close the polygon by tapping the first point

farm.photos_empty_desc: Show the land, coffee plants, and surroundings so the profile feels complete.

landing.hero_subheadline: Register free. Join the global directory of verified farms.
landing.hero_microcopy: No credit card. No certification required. Takes less than 5 minutes.
landing.how_headline: Three steps to global visibility. Zero cost.
landing.how_step1_desc: Upload your GPS polygon. Walk your perimeter, export KML, upload. Takes 5 minutes.
landing.how_step2_desc: Document your coffee lots and production milestones for transparency.
landing.how_step3_desc: Your farm appears in the global Open Farms directory. Buyers and investors find you directly.
landing.partners_headline: Invest in verified specialty coffee farms. Earn 40% of harvest profits.
landing.partners_body: Global co-investment in real coffee lots. Smart contracts on Base L2 distribute profits automatically. No debt. No intermediaries. Just results.
landing.partners_cta: Join the Digital Partner Waiting List
landing.waitlist_subheadline: We'll reach out personally to walk you through the first available farm lots.
landing.waitlist_trust_line: Fintech Americas Gold Winner · Prototypes for Humanity (Dubai)
landing.waitlist_disclaimer: Participation in Harvverse Digital Partnerships involves risk, including the potential loss of your invested capital. Returns depend on actual harvest performance and are not guaranteed. Past results from associated programs (2016–2019) are not indicative of future outcomes. Digital Partnerships are not registered securities under U.S. or Honduran law. This page does not constitute a public offering or investment advice. Availability may be restricted in certain jurisdictions. By joining this list, you are expressing interest only — no financial commitment is made at this stage.
landing.waitlist_microcopy: We'll notify you when Digital Partner access opens in your region. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.
landing.open_farms_subheadline: Real-time directory of verified producers. Browse by region, variety, or altitude.
landing.about_body: Harvverse is the platform where agricultural co-investment meets transparency. A farmer who registers their farm gets global visibility and access to capital — without debt, without intermediaries, and without losing their land.
landing.proven_headline: This model worked before blockchain existed. Now it scales globally.
landing.proven_partner: Co-founded with Sasa Sestic — World Barista Champion 2015
landing.proven_bridge: "COVID ended the physical program in 2020. Harvverse makes it permanent."
landing.tech_pillar1_desc: GPS polygons and production evidence verify every lot. Transparent and verifiable.
landing.tech_pillar2_desc: Automated 60/40 profit distribution. No intermediary. No manual process. Blockchain-verified.
landing.tech_pillar3_desc: Payments and profit distribution are settled directly on the blockchain.
landing.about_cta_headline: This is not a concept. Smart contracts are deployed. Farms are onboarding.
landing.directory_headline: Every farm. Verified. Publicly accessible. Free.
landing.directory_subheadline: The global directory for traceable coffee farmers.

lot_financial.plan_hint: Default values — adjust according to your agreement with the partner.
lot_financial.ticket_helper: How much the partner invests (in dollars)
lot_financial.price_helper: Price at which the coffee will be sold in USD/lb
lot_financial.agro_cost_helper: Farm expenses to produce this harvest (in dollars)
lot_financial.yield_helper: Quintals you expect to harvest in year one
lot_financial.yield_cap_helper: Maximum quintals this lot can produce
lot_financial.farmer_share_helper: Percentage of net profit that belongs to you
lot_financial.preview_note: Based on projected yield and sale price
lot_financial.tooltip_quintal: One quintal (qq) equals 100 pounds of coffee. It is the standard harvest measurement unit in Honduras.
lot_financial.tooltip_price_floor: The floor price is the minimum price at which the coffee will be sold, regardless of the market. It protects the farmer if prices fall.
lot_financial.tooltip_agro_cost: Agronomic cost includes all expenses needed to produce the harvest: fertilizers, labor, pesticides, and transport.
lot_financial.no_plan: No active plan published for this lot.

lot_proof.not_found_desc: This QR code does not match an available Harvverse Sentinel lot.

lot_proof.investment_argument_template: YieldPredict uses {area} mz × {baseYield} qq/mz ({variety}/{band}) × NDVI May-Sep {ndvi}x × density {density}x to estimate the next harvest.
